title: Sky Bet League One Manager and Player of the Month nominees
text: Sky Bet League One Manager and Player of the Month nominees, published on May 6, 2026. EFL official announcement covering nominees for the Sky Bet League One Manager of the Month award and Player of the Month award. The publication date is 2026-05-06. Source: EFL official news. Full nominee names not fully captured by scrape - article header only.
